title: KitchenPerfected Electric Potato Masher Hand Blender - Blends Purees Whisks - Baby Food, Vegetables & Potatoes - Soup Maker - E5401WH
features: CREATE MASHED POTATOES IN SECONDS - Forget about gloopy, sticky mash. With the KitchenPerfected Masher, serve your family and friends quality potatoes from the comfort of your home.

ULTIMATE FOOD BLENDER - Our specially deigned rotor blade technology works on more than just regular potatoes. You can also whip up wonderfully fresh veggies, baby food, soups, sauces, eggs, desserts, and more. It's soon to become the most versatile appliance in your kitchen and meal prep.

LESS STRAIN ON YOUR WRISTS - Stop wrestling with a potato masher, fork, ricer, or whisk to get the job done. The Masher stick blender is lightweight and requires zero elbow grease to use. It's quite effortless to operate

MAKE LIGHT WORK OF BLENDING, PUREEING, & WHISKING - This hand held food processor couldn't be easier to use. Put it directly in your cooking pan, pot, or bowl. Then hold down the ON button and watch it work it's magic. You don't have to scrape anything down like a traditional hand mixer.
PERFECT TEXTURE: Baby Food, Soups, Guacamole, Hummus, Cake Mix, Whipped Cream, Meringue, Purees, Mashed Potatoes, Carrots, Swedes & More
description: MASH - BEAT - BLEND - PUREE Using the Kitchen Perfected Masher with its unique designed, quiet slow running rotor technology gently lifts and aerates your food creating the perfect ultra-smooth and even texture. No aggressive high speed chopping blades that create lumpy and uneven texture. Whether it is delicious and nutritious baby food, creamy and lump free mashed potatoes or a light and smooth soup, the Kitchen Perfected Masher is simple to use and provides gourmet results every time. Box contains: 1x Kitchen Perfected Masher 1x Instruction Manual including Recipes
